v1ActorRef.description:
ActorRef is a lightweight reference to an Actor (for embedding in other messages).
Use this instead of full Actor when only identity info is needed (e.g., in audit logs).

v1ActorType.description:
ActorType classifies the entity performing actions.

 - ACTOR_TYPE_HUMAN: A human employee of the Vareal Group.
 - ACTOR_TYPE_AI_EMPLOYEE: An AI employee (e.g., Fujiwara Ai, Stefan Skye).
 - ACTOR_TYPE_SYSTEM: An automated system process (cron, workflow engine, etc.).
 - ACTOR_TYPE_EXTERNAL_SERVICE: An external service or API client.

v1AddProjectMemberResponse.description: AddProjectMemberResponse is the response after adding a project member.

v1CreateProjectResponse.description: CreateProjectResponse is the response after creating a project.

v1GetProjectResponse.description: GetProjectResponse is the response containing a single project.

v1GetProjectTasksResponse.description: GetProjectTasksResponse is the response containing tasks in a project.

v1ListProjectsResponse.description: ListProjectsResponse is the response for listing projects.

pageSize.description: Number of items per page (max enforced per-service).

v1PaginationRequest.description: PaginationRequest is the standard offset-based pagination input.

totalItems.description: Total number of matching items (may be expensive for large datasets).

v1PaginationResponse.description: PaginationResponse is the standard offset-based pagination output.

resourceMetadata.description: [Phase 2a] Standard resource metadata. Default security_level: INTERNAL.

v1Project.description: Project represents a managed project with metadata and hierarchy.

v1ProjectDetail.description: ProjectDetail bundles a project with resolved actor references.

v1ProjectMember.description: ProjectMember represents a member assigned to a project.

v1ProjectMemberDetail.description: ProjectMemberDetail bundles a project member with the employee reference.

v1ProjectMemberRole.description: ProjectMemberRole defines the role of a member within a project.

v1ProjectPriority.description: ProjectPriority indicates the urgency level of a project.

v1ProjectStatus.description: ProjectStatus represents the lifecycle state of a project.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was created.

deletedAt.description:
Soft-delete timestamp (null if not deleted).
For RESTRICTED resources, see SECURITY.md for physical deletion policy.

createdBy.description: Actor ID who created this resource.

updatedBy.description: Actor ID who last updated this resource.

labels.description: Arbitrary key-value labels for filtering and organization.

annotations.description: Arbitrary key-value annotations for tooling metadata.

securityLevel.description:
Security classification level for this resource (CISO directive).
Default when unspecified: treated as INTERNAL.

v1ResourceMetadata.description:
ResourceMetadata provides standard metadata for all Sirosimes resources.
Every domain entity across all products should embed this message to ensure
consistent tracking, versioning, and security classification.

Related types:
  - Actor/ActorRef (actor.proto): created_by/updated_by reference Actor IDs.
  - AuditLog (audit.proto): changes to resources are tracked via audit events.
  - SecurityLevel: controls access, encryption, and retention policies.

Default behavior for security_level:
  When security_level is UNSPECIFIED (0), domain services SHOULD treat the resource
  as INTERNAL (level 2) by default. This ensures that resources without explicit
  classification are not accidentally treated as PUBLIC. Services MAY override this
  default with stricter levels based on their domain requirements.

v1SecurityLevel.description:
SecurityLevel classifies data sensitivity per CISO directive (ISO 27001 aligned).

Classification guide:
  PUBLIC (1)       — Marketing content, public documentation, open-source code.
                     Encryption: transit only. Logging: optional. Retention: unlimited.
  INTERNAL (2)     — Internal wikis, team communications, non-sensitive business data.
                     Encryption: transit required. Logging: optional. Retention: 3 years.
  CONFIDENTIAL (3) — Financial reports, HR records, customer data, business strategies.
                     Encryption: transit + at-rest. Logging: required. Retention: 1 year.
                     Masking required when exposed externally.
  RESTRICTED (4)   — PII, credentials, API keys, authentication tokens, audit trails.
                     Encryption: transit + at-rest + field-level. Logging: required + tamper detection.
                     Retention: 6 months. Masking: always required.

 - SECURITY_LEVEL_PUBLIC: Open data, no access restrictions. Marketing, public docs.
 - SECURITY_LEVEL_INTERNAL: Internal use only. Team wikis, non-sensitive business data.
 - SECURITY_LEVEL_CONFIDENTIAL: Business-sensitive, need-to-know basis. Financial, HR, customer data.
 - SECURITY_LEVEL_RESTRICTED: Highest sensitivity. PII, credentials, tokens, audit trails.

id.description: [Phase 2a dual-write] Prefer metadata.id for new code.

metadata.description: [Phase 2a] Standard resource metadata. Default security_level: INTERNAL.

v1Task.description: Task represents a unit of work within a project.

v1TaskDetail.description: TaskDetail bundles a task with resolved actor references.

v1TaskPriority.description: TaskPriority indicates the urgency level of a task.

v1TaskStatus.description: TaskStatus represents the workflow state of a task.

v1UpdateProjectResponse.description: UpdateProjectResponse is the response after updating a project.
